purpose: Preflight snapshot of preserved SFT v2 artifacts in B2 before plain-text GRPO run. Re-list and diff after the run to confirm no SFT v2 deletion or overwrite occurred.

qwen3_32b_run3/artifacts/sft_v2_merged.note: SFT v2 merged weights — must remain untouched

qwen3_32b_run3/grpo_v2_ckpts.note: Old JSON-tool GRPO progress logs (no checkpoints) — preserved

deploy_guard: rl_training/scripts/deploy_grpo_sftv2_runpod.py:_assert_preserves_sft_v2 refuses to launch if --b2-prefix collides with the preserved prefixes above; the on-pod bootstrap re-checks $B2_PREFIX with the same guard.
